summary: Tested CSV/PDF import functionality for Arrow Tracker Score Keeping page. All UI tests pass. CSV parsing unit tests show 96.9% success rate (31/32 tests pass). The app compiles without errors.

code_issues.issue: Alternative header format 'Session,Archer Name,Bow,Score' incorrectly maps 'Session' to name column instead of 'Archer Name'
code_issues.details: The nameIdx finder matches h === 'session' before h.includes('name') can match 'archer name'. This is a minor edge case since the standard format Date,Name,BowType,TotalScore works correctly.

score_keeping_page_loads.details: Score Keeping header visible and page renders correctly

import_button_visible_clickable.details: Select File to Import button is visible, enabled, and clickable

competition_sessions_section.details: Competition Sessions section visible with empty state

export_pdf_button.details: Export PDF button visible (grayed out when no data)

info_text.details: Import CSV files info text visible

test_details.parseCSVLine_basic: PASS - Basic comma-separated values parsed correctly
test_details.parseCSVLine_quoted: PASS - Quoted values with commas handled correctly
test_details.parseMultiArcherCSV_positional_fallback: PASS - Falls back to positional parsing when headers unknown

failed_test.name: Alternative header names (Session,Archer Name,Bow,Score)
failed_test.reason: h === 'session' matches before h.includes('name') for 'archer name'

arrow_tracker_data_markers.pdf_generation: report.tsx:1262-1270 generates ARROW_TRACKER_DATA_START/END markers with Date,Name,BowType,TotalScore format

methods: Method 3: ATIMPORT markers for competition PDFs

app_compilation.details: No compilation errors in expo logs. Web bundle successful (1415 modules).

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix nameIdx finder in parseMultiArcherCSV to prioritize h.includes('name') over h === 'session' (scoreKeeping.tsx:326)
critical_code_review_comments: CSV parsing correctly handles the standard format: Date,Name,BowType,TotalScore
PDF import correctly looks for ARROW_TRACKER_DATA markers generated by report.tsx
parseCSVLine helper correctly handles quoted values with embedded commas

success_rate.frontend: 100% UI tests, 96.9% CSV parsing unit tests

context_for_next_testing_agent: CSV and PDF import functionality verified. File import uses native DocumentPicker module which cannot be directly tested in web browser. CSV parsing logic verified through unit tests. The standard format Date,Name,BowType,TotalScore works correctly. One minor edge case with alternative 'Session' header exists but doesn't affect normal usage.

csv_import_fix.observation: CSV import functionality appears to be working correctly based on code review and unit tests
csv_import_fix.parsing_logic: parseMultiArcherCSV function correctly identifies columns by header names and falls back to positional parsing
csv_import_fix.pdf_import_support: ARROW_TRACKER_DATA markers from report.tsx are correctly parsed in scoreKeeping.tsx
